title: CrazyMonsters
description: Random monster size,max health,armor,attack,even monster reborn!!!
body:
This is a very simple mod.

This mod allows every monster entity to have a chance to roll for random size, max health, attack damage, armor, and armor toughness.

If any monster entity dies, there is a chance that it will be reborn.

Every chance can be fine-tuned through the config file.

You’re free to drop this into any modpack—no need to ask or get permission—and recording videos is more than welcome.

可以自由随意的加入到整合包中，无须询问或申请，录制视频也非常的欢迎。
